evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 27851857. 2017/03/01 00:00. OBJECTIVE: To evaluate the efficacy and safety of eravacycline compared with 
ertapenem in adult hospitalized patients with complicated intra-abdominal 
infections (cIAIs).
DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: This was a phase III, randomized, 
double-blind, multicenter study that evaluated the efficacy and safety of 
eravacycline in comparison with ertapenem in patients with cIAI requiring
